chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 62 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25 & 26 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.831/2021 30.10.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. This reference application is pending since 2021 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. On the last date learned counsel sought time to reformulate questions of law and at his request specific fixed date was given. However, today brief is being held and merely adjournment sought on behalf of the applicant’s counsel. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad
